name: Taco Compuesto
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet cook ground beef, onion, green chili pepper, and minced garlic over medium heat until beef is browned. Drain off fat. Stir in chili powder.
2. In a mixing bowl combine chopped tomato, Italian salad dressing, and seasoned salt. Spoon beef mixture into taco shells. Top with tomato mixture, shredded lettuce, shredded cheese, and taco sauce. Makes 4 servings. Time: 20 minutes.
